requiredSecrets.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.label: OpenRouter API key
requiredSecrets.description: LLM provider key for this habitat.

requiredSecrets.name: GAIA_A2A_URL
requiredSecrets.label: Gaia A2A URL
requiredSecrets.description: Base URL of the Gaia orchestrator's A2A endpoint (e.g. https://gaia.habitats.example.com). Optional — without it Help answers from its built-in product knowledge only.

requiredSecrets.name: GAIA_A2A_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.label: Gaia A2A token
requiredSecrets.description: Bearer token for Gaia's /a2a endpoint (its HABITAT_API_KEY). Optional if Gaia runs open.
